# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/psf/black/issues/4504
# repo: psf/black
# title: `tests/test_blackd.py` runs out of fds on systems with high nproc (is blackd leaking fds?)

    # 1. Errr, get a system with high `nproc`… (perhaps some mocking will work?)
    # 2. `tox -e py312-ci` (xdist in non-CI jobs works around the problem)

    raise OSError('reproduce: see https://github.com/psf/black/issues/4504')

if __name__ == '__main__':
